name: codex-dev-orchestrator
description: Durable, review-gated software delivery with native Codex subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, review, and verify with Codex
interface.longDescription: A durable Codex-only delivery workflow with Markdown handoffs, role-specific native subagents, writer leases, independent reviews, browser QA, and explicit production gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Codex Dev Orchestrator to plan and deliver this change.
